_meta.purpose: Heritage tag definitions for the 12 captain country-fragment options.

schema.id: string — tag ID (matches captain-origins.json tag_pool entry)
schema.dialog_tone: string — sentence on how this captain speaks in Ink
schema.cover_test_flavor: string — sentence on how this fragment affects cover-test voice

heritage_tags.dialog_tone: Solidarity language. Contract nouns. Uses 'we' before 'I' when crew are present.
heritage_tags.cover_test_flavor: Suspicion threshold against corporate authority runs 1 lower.

heritage_tags.dialog_tone: Defiant register. Minimal clauses. Skips formal address with contractor-types.
heritage_tags.cover_test_flavor: Defiant dialog options squelch less; cover-test failure against T1 softens one step.

heritage_tags.dialog_tone: Procedure-heavy. Citation by article number. Formal escalation preferred.
heritage_tags.cover_test_flavor: Authoritative dialog options gain +1 bond in ED stations.

heritage_tags.dialog_tone: Stateless register. Mixed idiom. Suspicious of paperwork unless crew are present.
heritage_tags.cover_test_flavor: Default suspicion in non-ED stations starts 1 higher.

heritage_tags.dialog_tone: Sparse. Numeric shorthand. Uses metric shorthand and energy-unit metaphors.
heritage_tags.cover_test_flavor: Numeric dialog options gain bond in RRA contexts.

heritage_tags.dialog_tone: Watchful. Short answers. Name-drops freight routing casually.
heritage_tags.cover_test_flavor: Suspicion penalty in RRA stations reduced by 1.

heritage_tags.dialog_tone: Fast register. Brief. Trade idioms. Respects transit authority over rank.
heritage_tags.cover_test_flavor: Fast/defiant dialog paths dampen suspicion rise.

heritage_tags.dialog_tone: Quiet. Precise. Favors logistics verbs over emotional language.
heritage_tags.cover_test_flavor: Quiet/neutral paths give +1 bond in AC stations.

heritage_tags.dialog_tone: Collective register. Agricultural metaphors. Uses growth verbs for progress.
heritage_tags.cover_test_flavor: Solidarity options in SAA beats gain bond.

heritage_tags.dialog_tone: High-alert. Short. Stateless idiom. Avoids trust verbs unless bond is high.
heritage_tags.cover_test_flavor: Default suspicion starts 1 higher; trust gains are worth +1 extra.
